holdings.infoBox: VWO is an equity ETF with a total of 5077 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 14.66%, Slcmt1142 at 3.09%, Tencent Holdings at 2.74%, Alibaba Group Holding at 2.26%, and MediaTek at 1.62%.

overview.description: The Vanguard FTSE Emerging Markets ETF (VWO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Emerging Net Tax (US RIC) index. The fund is passively managed to provide exposure to the emerging markets equity space. It holds stocks of any market capitalization. VWO was launched on Mar 4, 2005 and is issued by Vanguard.
